titleStmt.title: SII 31.316: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 316. (A.R. No. B 329 of 1936.) URUṬŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the Gaṛēśa shrine to the north of the village.
This undated inscription can be assigned to 15th century on the basis of palaeography.

Begining lost. Registers a grant of income drived from taxes on the kāmpus at the rate of 12 māḍas per year, made to a temple by Dommari community, for the worship of the god on different occasions like śivarātri for the merit of twenty four communities.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kramameṭlaṁnanu
vāriki yiccēpaṁnnu mīvūri
dana naivēdyālakuṁnu parupatidhulakuṁnnu dēvuṁḍu
ṭaṁdukunu śivarātri tī[¨rthā]naku kulālakunnu
gānu māyiruvainālugu kulālakunnu puṇyaṁgānu
nu dhāravōśi yistimigāna mīruṁ grāmamu mahāja
nālu dēvuniki Eṁṭanu tappakuṁḍānu mahātsavālu
śēyiṁcuvāru nēmumākulālavāru yavvaru ganaka I dā
nānaku tappinānu tama mātāpitāḷanu vāraṇāśi
lōnu vadhīṁccina dōṣāna bōvuvāru gōvu brāhmānini vāraṇāśi
lōnu vadhiṁccinadōṣānu bōvuvāru . tanabiḍḍalanu jaṁpi
netturu tāginavāru Aṁdula kuṁnu tappivaccivāru tamagā
kuḍicinavāru gu
ḍicinavāru AniIcina dānapatriṁ yīdānapatraṁ
Iccinaṁdu yēṁḍu . ki kāṁpulamīdanu paṁ
nu yettipaṁḍreṁḍu yeḍalekanu yetti dēvuniki paṁcca
parvāluṁnnu mahātsavāluṁnnu tappakuṁḍāna
ḍpṛuvāru AniIccina dānapatraṁ Idānapatraṁ Icci
na timmarāju ceṁnnappagāri vopaṁperumāḷaku
yipaṁḍreṁḍu māḍaluṁnu dēvunī mīru mahājanālu
Iyaka Avarōthiṁcināsu tamamātā pitāḍlaku
tappina dōṣāna bōvuvāru śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.316 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
